en.extract:
The Solomons robin (Petroica polymorpha) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae. It is found in the Solomon Islands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subalpine shrubland.


Subspecies


References

International Ornithological Congress (July 25, 2020). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved July 25, 2020.
en.wikitext:
{{Short description|Species of bird}} {{Speciesbox | image = | status = | genus = Petroica | species = polymorpha | authority = [[Ernst Mayr|Mayr]], 1934 | synonyms = }} The '''Solomons robin''' ('''''Petroica polymorpha''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Petroicidae]]. It is found in the [[Solomon Islands]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s and subalpine shrubland. == Subspecies == {| style="width:98%;" class="wikitable" ! style="text-align:center; background:#d3d3a4;" colspan="4"|'''Subspecies of Solomons robin''' |- ! style="width:23%; text-align:center;"|Trinomial name
and author ! style="width:30%; text-align:center;"|Range ! style="text-align:center;"|Description and notes |- |''P. p. polymorpha'' (Mayr, 1934) |[[Marika Island|Marika]]; Solomon Islands |The males are dimorphic, some with black and some with rufous heads, lacking the white forehead; the female resembles the rufous headed male, but duller. |- |''P. p. septentrionalis'' (Mayr, 1934) |[[Bougainville Island|Bougainville]]; [[Papua New Guinea]] |Male identical to black headed morph of ''P. m. polymorpha''; female has more rufous upperparts and some white in the wing. |- |''P. p. kulambangrae'' (Mayr, 1934) |[[Kolombangara]]; west Solomon Islands |Male same as ''P. m. septentrionalis''; female has reddish upperparts and deeper red breast. |- |''P. p. dennisi'' (Cain & I.C.J Galbraith, 1955) |[[Guadalcanal]]; south Solomon Islands |Male same as black-morph ''P. m. polymorpha''; female has olive-brown crown and blacker back and wings. |} ==References== {{Reflist}} * {{Cite web |author= International Ornithological Congress |authorlink=International Ornithological Congress |title= IOC World Bird List |date=July 25, 2020 |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/the-project/ |accessdate= July 25, 2020 }} {{Petroicidae}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q97738496}} [[Category:Petroica|Solomons robin]] [[Category:Birds of the Solomon Islands]] [[Category:Endemic fauna of the Solomon Islands]] [[Category:Birds described in 1934|Solomons robin]] [[Category:Taxa named by Ernst Mayr|Solomons robin]] [[Category:Endemic birds of the Solomon Islands]] {{Petroicidae-stub}}
